TABLE DOD_VEND_PROFILE(
  row_id,                -- primary key, vendor internal id
  name,                  -- vendor display name / shop name
  legal_name,            -- registered legal entity name
  trade_name,            -- trade / brand name
  address,               -- primary address
  city,                  -- vendor city
  state,                 -- vendor state
  country,               -- vendor country
  zipcode,               -- postal code

  phone,                 -- primary phone number
  email,                 -- email address
  email_verified,        -- email verification flag
  username,              -- login username

  gstnumber,             -- GSTIN
  gst_state_code,        -- GST state code
  gst_registration_type, -- REGULAR, COMPOSITION, etc
  gst_filing_frequency,  -- MONTHLY, QUARTERLY

  pan_number,            -- PAN
  fy_start_month,        -- financial year start month

  approved_flag,         -- Y/N approval flag
  approval_status,       -- PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED
  approved_by,           -- approver username

  active_flag,           -- Y/N active status
  suspend_flag,          -- Y/N suspended
  deleted_state,         -- soft delete flag

  payment_gateway_mode,  -- TEST / LIVE
  upi_id,                -- vendor UPI id

  shipping_enabled,      -- Y/N shipping enabled

  invoice_settings,      -- JSON/text invoice configuration

  tenant_id,             -- tenant identifier
  created,               -- created timestamp
  updated                -- last updated timestamp
)
